description.value:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.jkTo4JHbEf4eMnV6]{Shoanti War Paint (Green)} — one application, lasting 1 hour. You can benefit from only one color of Shoanti war paint at a time; applying a different color replaces this effect.

When you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IAjvwqgiDr3qGYxY]{Inspire Courage} composition cantrip, the status bonus granted increases by 1.

No rule element: the bonus rides on the bard's own aura effect (automation would be fragile).

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
